productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Cfc Graphic Black Backpack
description: When you want to show off your sporty style, there is no better way to do it than with this bag from adidas. This is a Chelsea football club themed bag for the Chelsea fan. Height: 42 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 15 cm Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining with synthetic base One main zippered compartment with a separator to hold your laptop One zippered compartment on the front with printed branding and Chelsea FC lettering and graphic print; has organiser pouches inside Padded and adjustable mesh shoulder straps with adidas logo, has Climacool technology Suction points on PU embedded on the straps and back for better support Chelsea FC embroidered on the back Fabric haul loop for handling ease Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
